name: imentor-platform
description: iMentor AI Tutor Platform - Complete Suite

scripts.test:all: npm run test:server && npm run test
scripts.audit:security: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && cd server && npm audit --audit-level=moderate && cd ../frontend && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.audit:deps: echo '=== Server Dependencies ===' && npx depcheck server && echo '=== Frontend Dependencies ===' && npx depcheck frontend
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run cleanup:dev && npm run build:frontend && npm run start:dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run test:all && npm run audit:security && npm run cleanup:dev && npm run build:frontend && npm run start:prod

author: iMentor Team
